Wheat Flour, Coconut Oil, Glucose Syrup, Sugar, Whey Powder (Milk), Skimmed Milk Powder, Soy Flour, Barley Malt Extract, Raising Agents (Sodium Hydrogen Carbonate, Disodium Diphosphate), Salt, Emulsifier Soy Lecithin, Fat-Reduced Cocoa, Bourbon Vanilla Pods, Hazelnuts, Spices.

metaData.Key Information: There is no better way to enjoy the inimitable Loacker vanilla flavor in such a bite-size delicacy: Four layers of delicate vanilla cream filling are held by five crispy wafers. The fine cream filling with exquisite Bourbon vanilla pods from our sustainability program will guarantee exquisite taste sensations!
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool, dry place

metaData.Key Information: The original cube shaped flavour combination when opposites are combined, completely new flavour combinations are created. The contrast between dark cocoa wafers and light-coloured milk cream has a strong attraction which nobody can resist. The intense taste of five light, crispy wafers form a union with the tender flavour of four layers of delicate, high-quality Loacker milk-cream filling, offering an original taste sensation, strong and tender at the same time.
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool dry place
Store in a cool dry place
